title: Emit NonTerminalAliasMap to generated grammars for hidden alias resolution
description:
The alias visibility fix (044e755/4cw) handles production-based alias sequences but NOT the NonTerminalAliasMap. Perl string_content (57 tests) and Lua quoted string_content (5+ tests) use hidden underlying symbols (_noninterpolated_string_content, _doublequote_string_content) that need the NonTerminalAliasMap to be recognized as visible via alias.

The map is extracted by extractNonTerminalAliasMap in internal/generate/extract.go:327 but never emitted to generated language.go files and has no corresponding field in the Language struct.

Fix: (1) Add NonTerminalAliasMap field to Language struct, (2) emit it in code generator, (3) consult it in SummarizeChildren/findVisibleChildByIndex/findNamedChildByIndex alongside production-based alias sequences.

Impact: Perl 59%→86% (+52 tests), Lua 70%→97% (+10 tests)
